history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man takes a mirror selfie in a room with patterned wallpaper. He is wearing a white long-sleeved t-shirt with blue graphics on it, and a black sweater draped over his shoulders. He has on light grey sweatpants with a double black stripe down each leg. The background features a water cooler with a large blue water jug on top, an air conditioning unit mounted high on the wall, and a wooden cabinet to the left. The lighting is somewhat dim, creating a slight blue cast on the floor tiles and the water cooler. The mood is casual and relaxed. The overall color palette consists of muted browns and beiges from the wallpaper, white and blue from the t-shirt, grey from the pants, and black from the sweater. The image has a slight vignette effect.
